summary: Handoff spine live. Supersedes hag/RELAY.md (frozen at MSG-007) and the hand-mirrored DECISIONS_LOCKED. New cross-agent messages go here via handoff-append; RELAY.md stays read-only for history.

Carried from RELAY MSG-002: slut retracts three points from MSG-001 where it overstepped hag's lane. hag to confirm the retraction lands.

summary: Carried from RELAY MSG-005: identity seam is LIVE (dual-keyed content_sha256 + ISRC); hashing pass running to full coverage. One integration question open for hag.
Carried from RELAY MSG-007: disposition of the offtrack_cues export (the 2,236 rows removed from music_v4.db on 2026-07-02, MIR = hag's lane). hag to say whether it wants them.

Routing build GATED pending R1-R4 remediation.

CORRECTION to event #4 (audit F-018): the identity seam is dual-keyed content_sha256 (primary) + track_id (secondary), NOT +ISRC. ISRC is a nullable tertiary key (~25.2k/31.4k coverage). Join on track_id, not ISRC, or ~6k tracks orphan. state/hag.json + state/slut.json corrected.
